assertions.assertion: Test with role=admin claims asserts HttpStatusCode.NoContent (204)
Test with role=viewer claims asserts HttpStatusCode.Forbidden (403)
Test with no claims (unauthenticated) asserts HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized (401)
Each test sets distinct claims via the TestClaimsProvider before making the request
assertions.rationale: Each test calls SetClaims() or ClearClaims() with different claim sets

assertions.assertion: Uses IClassFixture<T> or equivalent to share the WebApplicationFactory across tests
